title: Audit MAP systems integration and governance adoption
description: Retired as duplicate of TASK-128, which is the READY coordinator task for operator hcom #22305 MAP systems integration audit.
acceptance_criteria: Audit all newly adopted MAP systems from DEC-015 through DEC-026 for completeness, MAP standards alignment, cross-links, and non-duplication
Evaluate whether LangGraph, HPOM, RnS, and Emergence/Insights are actually used in task planning, delegation, review, release, and operator-facing workflow
Identify concrete gaps between written systems and runnable/enforced behavior, separating documentation gaps from validator/gate/runner gaps
Produce a prioritized follow-up task sequence with one accountable coordinator/manager role and review/delegation boundaries
Run root MAP graph/event validators and avoid direct broad rewrites outside the audit output paths
